name: sendpulse
description: Reads SendPulse address books, campaigns, and senders through the SendPulse API.

risk.read: external SendPulse API read of address book, campaign, and sender data

conformance.reason: oauth2_client_credentials auth requires a real token_url; conformance's synthetic non-secret config value ("synthetic-conformance-value") is not a resolvable URL, so the token exchange fails before any declarative request is ever issued, and every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively. Static checks (spec/schema validity, interpolations_resolve, docs/fixtures presence, secret redaction) still run and pass; parity for the read/pagination/schema-projection shape is proven by structural review against legacy internal/connectors/sendpulse (this bundle has no Tier-2 hook, so there is no paritytest package for this wave).
